description: Ably is a realtime infrastructure platform for pub/sub messaging, chat, live collaboration, and related realtime application features. It provides global messaging services plus account and application management tooling for developers.
summary: Ably exposes three documented developer integration surfaces: a data-plane REST API, an SSE/raw HTTP streaming API, a Control API for account and app management, plus an npm-distributed `ably` CLI; authentication uses Ably API keys, Ably-signed client JWTs/tokens, dashboard-created access tokens, or CLI OAuth login depending on surface.
